hero.headline: Factory-Direct Heavy Equipment Attachments
hero.subheadline: Sub-zero resilient HSLA manganese steel. OEM-grade quality. No middlemen.

features.subzeroDesc: HSLA manganese steel tested to perform in extreme Canadian winters.
features.oemDesc: Full-penetration welds. Ultrasonic inspected. CE & ISO 9001 certified.
features.factoryDesc: No middlemen. No dealer markups. Direct from production floor to your site.
features.deliveryDesc: LTL freight across Canada. Real-time shipping quotes at checkout.

cta.title: Ready to equip your fleet?
cta.subtitle: Browse our full catalog or request a custom quote for your project.

about.facilityPhotoNote: Photo placeholder — CNC & robotic welding line
about.factoryP1: Our source facility is located in the heart of the world's largest hydraulic machinery manufacturing cluster — a region responsible for supplying attachments to leading OEMs across five continents.
about.factoryP2: With over 60,000 m² of production floor, the facility operates CNC plasma cutting tables, robotic welding stations, precision boring machines, and dedicated heat treatment furnaces — all under ISO 9001 quality management.
about.qaSubtitle: Every attachment passes through a rigorous 4-stage quality gate before it ships.
about.qa1Desc: Every steel plate traced to mill test certificates. HSLA manganese steel meets or exceeds ASTM A572 Grade 50.
about.qa2Desc: CNC plasma cutting with ±1mm tolerance. Robotic MIG/MAG welding for consistent bead quality.
about.qa3Desc: Full-penetration welds inspected via ultrasonic testing per AWS D1.1 structural welding code.
about.qa4Desc: Dimensional verification, hydraulic function test, and surface finish audit before crating.
about.timelineSubtitle: Two decades of continuous investment in precision manufacturing and quality systems.
about.tl2003: Source facility established in global hydraulic manufacturing hub
about.tl2012: Robotic welding lines commissioned — capacity reaches 3,000 units/year
about.tl2016: CE marking obtained for European and North American markets
about.tl2020: CNC plasma cutting and precision machining center expansion
about.tl2024: Boreal Iron Heavy launches factory-direct channel for Canada
about.ctaTitle: See the Engineering Behind Every Attachment
about.ctaSubtitle: Explore our material specifications and cold-weather performance data.

steel.title: Engineered for Canadian Winters
steel.subtitle: Our attachments are built with Q355 high-strength low-alloy manganese steel — equivalent to ASTM A572 Grade 50 — tested to perform at -30°C and below.
steel.wearPlate: Critical wear surfaces reinforced with Hardox 450 abrasion-resistant plate.
steel.compSubtitle: Side-by-side comparison across four critical performance dimensions. All values represent standard specification minimums.
steel.mechYieldNote: Q355 meets or exceeds A572 Gr.50 yield requirements
steel.mechTensileNote: Comparable tensile range across both standards
steel.mechNote: Values shown are specification minimums per GB/T 1591 (Q355) and ASTM A572/A572M. Actual mill test results may exceed these values. Final certification available upon request.
steel.chemNote: Q355 typically features tighter impurity limits (P, S) than A572, resulting in cleaner steel with fewer non-metallic inclusions.
steel.charpyNote: Impact values represent minimum specification requirements. Actual tested values are typically 30–50% higher. Mill test certificates available upon request.
steel.ceDesc: Both Q355 and ASTM A572 Grade 50 feature low carbon equivalent values, enabling excellent weldability without mandatory pre-heat in most conditions.
steel.ceNote: CE ≤ 0.45% = no pre-heat required for plates up to 25mm in standard ambient conditions.
steel.dualDesc: Our attachments use a proven dual-layer approach: Q355 HSLA steel for the structural body, and Hardox 450 abrasion-resistant plate for high-wear contact surfaces — cutting edges, bucket floors, and side cutters.
steel.layer1Desc: High strength, excellent weldability, sub-zero impact rated.
steel.layer2Desc: 450 HBW hardness. Resists abrasion, impact, and gouging in rocky terrain.
steel.hardoxThicknessDesc: Used on cutting edges and bucket floors
steel.hardoxNote: Hardox is a registered trademark of SSAB. Values shown are typical published specifications.
steel.ctaSubtitle: We provide full material traceability. Request MTCs for any order.

origin.title: Global Hub of Hydraulic Excellence
origin.subtitle: Yantai, China — the world capital of hydraulic machinery manufacturing. Two decades of precision engineering, now delivered direct to Canadian job sites.
